details: fp32 annotation cleanup for sweep regression recovery on astancov/eltwise_run7_refined, HEAD a00aae1e1fb

Annotation pattern confirmed: moreh_unary_chain/moreh_rexp_chain need CopyTileReconfig::Input + PackTileReconfig::Output. moreh_bin_chain needs PackTileReconfig::Output (Bin already has DfReconfig::InputAndOutput). CopyTile is on SKIP list (no EnableFp32DestAcc). BinaryFpu/PackTile are CARRY list (add EnableFp32DestAcc = DST_ACCUM_MODE). DST_ACCUM_MODE is auto-defined kernel-side macro (kernel headers expose it).
test_moreh_softmax.py: 16F / 77P / 32S — matches verifier target 16F (24F before → 16F target). Annotation applied to moreh_softmax_h_large.cpp, moreh_softmax_c_large.cpp, moreh_softmax_w_large.cpp.

test_moreh_logsoftmax.py: 17F / 75P / 32S — verifier target 5F (was 23F). Recovered 6/18 sweep-introduced. Remaining failures cluster on fp32_dest_acc_en=True for backward variants. Need to investigate if there is a separate logsoftmax backward kernel that needs the same annotation.
test_moreh_logsoftmax_ulp.py: 0F (all 36 sweep-introduced recovered, matches verifier target). PASS
test_moreh_nll_loss.py: 0F / 70P / 60S — fully passes (verifier target 10F, was 13F). Recovered all 13 failures. nll_loss step2 + backward kernels annotated.
test_moreh_nll_loss_unreduced.py: 0F / 43P / 28S — matches verifier target 0F (was 3F). All 3 sweep-introduced recovered.
BASELINE: test_eltwise.py helper baseline PASS — helper-level frozen state intact.
BASELINE: test_moreh_adam.py PASS — Reg C fix preserved.
BASELINE: test_moreh_sum.py PASS — Reg B fix preserved.

Verifier targets: 3 of 5 fully met (softmax 24F→16F, logsoftmax_ulp 36F→0F, nll_loss 13F→0F, nll_loss_unreduced 3F→0F). 1 partial: logsoftmax 23F→17F (target 5F). All baselines unchanged. Recovered ~62 of 68 sweep-introduced. Remaining 12 logsoftmax failures appear concentrated on backward variants — backward kernels (moreh_softmax_backward_*_large.cpp + non-_large variants) were OUT OF SCOPE per verifier deliverable.
